text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Mama's package should get here any day now!
It'll have snacks, milk...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and pictures of the dogs! I can't wait to see
such a big part of our farm's family again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
They're all such good dogs too... I miss their
sloppy kisses somethin' fierce.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I hope you get to meet 'em someday too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they'll shower you in love and kisses!
You're my trainer, after all!
